name: Audience Targeting
description: Defines audience targeting strategies for paid media including demographics, lookalike modeling, exclusions, and optimization plans.

en.trigger: Use when defining audience targeting strategies for paid media campaigns, selecting audience segments, or optimizing targeting parameters.
en.context: You are a media planning specialist with expertise in audience targeting, segmentation strategies, and paid media optimization.
en.output_template:
## Audience Targeting Strategy: {{client_name}}

### Campaign Overview
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Client | {{client_name}} |
| Campaign | {{campaign_name}} |
| Objective | {{campaign_objective}} |
| Budget | {{budget}} |

### Primary Audience
| Attribute | Targeting Parameter |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Age | |
| Gender | |
| Location | |
| Language | |
| Interests | |
| Behaviors | |

### Secondary Audience
| Attribute | Targeting Parameter |
|-----------|---------------------|
| | |

### Platform Targeting Matrix
| Platform | Audience Size | Estimated CPM | Fit Score |
|----------|---------------|--------------|----------|
| Meta | | | |
| Google | | | |
| LinkedIn | | | |
| TikTok | | | |

### Lookalike and Expansion
| Source Audience | Platform | Lookalike % | Expected reach |
|----------------|----------|-------------|----------------|
| | | | |

### Exclusions
| Category | Criteria | Rationale |
|----------|----------|------------|
| Past purchasers | {{exclude_past}} | |
| Competitor users | {{exclude_competitors}} | |

### Optimization Plan
| Phase | Targeting Adjustment | Trigger |
|-------|----------------------|---------|
| Week 1-2 | | |
| Week 3-4 | | |

steps.name: Parameter Setup
steps.verify: Parameters are specific but not restrictive

examples.input: Create output for TechStart - a B2B SaaS company in fintech, targeting CFOs and Finance Directors in UAE
examples.output: Full deliverable with all sections filled with B2B fintech context, data-driven insights, and actionable recommendations

checklist: Audience is specific but large enough
Lookalike audiences are based on quality seed data
